versions.name: Lumpkin Adventure Base
versions.summary: High-adventure base spanning 117 acres in the Tessentee Valley bordering the Nantahala National Forest, serving as the Daniel Boone Council's staging point for week-long backpacking treks through the mountains of North Carolina, Tennessee, and Georgia.

provenance.notes: Imported from camp-finder; raw description and sessions dropped (operational data stays at the council site). The evergreen summary is original prose regenerated from that description, excluding dates/fees/schedules. camp_type classified from program_types.
